command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2t5rixfHAYLQmtB.9f3d6c4c4f9f --database NigNpTxRrpwoLqf7dXXspm --execute 
DO $$ BEGIN
  IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_type WHERE typname = 'alert_rule_metric') THEN
    CREATE TYPE alert_rule_metric AS ENUM('risk_score','sanctions_confidence','pep_confidence','adverse_media_count','duplicate_identity_score','velocity_hourly','velocity_daily','credit_score');
  END IF;
  IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_type WHERE typname = 'alert_rule_operator') THEN
    CREATE TYPE alert_rule_operator AS ENUM('gt','gte','lt','lte','eq','neq');
  END IF;
END $$;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS alert_rules (
  id serial PRIMARY KEY,
  name varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  description text,
  metric alert_rule_metric NOT NULL,
  operator alert_rule_operator NOT NULL DEFAULT 'gte',
  threshold real NOT NULL,
  severity severity NOT NULL DEFAULT 'high',
  enabled boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  "autoEscalate" boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  "notifyOwner" boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  "createdBy" varchar(255),
  "createdAt" timestamp DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  "updatedAt" timestamp DEFAULT now() NOT NULL
);
